subcodes.first_line: O peerless Glory! Occupation with service at the Sacred Threshold hath hindered the writing of letters and replies to the beloved ones of Iran [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جلال بیهمال مانع از نگارش خطاب و جواب به احبای ایران اشتغال در خدمت آستان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
